case_title: REYES, MARILOU S. VS GOLDEN GATE ELECTRONICS C/O MARCO

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $200.00 FILED BY REYES, MARILOU S. AS TO DEFENDANT GOLDEN GATE ELECTRONICS C/O MARCO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-17-1993 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 03
INVALID SERVICE AS TO GOLDEN GATE, NO MAILING DONE ON SUBSERVICE.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF REYES, MARILOU S. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GOLDEN GATE ELECTRONICS C/O MARCO $160.00 PRINCIPAL, $15.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $175.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT GOLDEN GATE ELECTRONICS C/O MARCO
MOTION RECONSIDERATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF REYES, MARILOU S. HEARING SET FOR AUG-04-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 08
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION RECONSIDERATION OF AUG-04-1993, DENIED
